qualifiers.espnText: Lineups are announced and players are warming up.

events.description: 首发阵容公布，球员热身。

qualifiers.espnText: First Half begins.

events.description: 上半场开始。

qualifiers.espnText: Attempt saved. Jackson Irvine (Australia) right footed shot from the right side of the box is saved in the top centre of the goal by Orlando Gill (Paraguay). Assisted by Cristian Volpato with a cross.

events.description: 杰克逊·埃尔文射正。 克里斯蒂安·沃尔帕托参与进攻。

qualifiers.espnText: Corner, Australia. Conceded by Orlando Gill.

events.description: 澳大利亚获得角球。

qualifiers.espnText: Foul by Jordan Bos (Australia).

events.description: 乔丹·博斯犯规。

qualifiers.espnText: Corner, Australia. Conceded by Matías Galarza.

events.description: 澳大利亚获得角球。

qualifiers.espnText: Attempt missed. Aiden O'Neill (Australia) right footed shot from outside the box is high and wide to the right. Assisted by Connor Metcalfe.

events.description: 艾登·奥尼尔射门偏出。 康纳·梅特卡夫参与进攻。

qualifiers.espnText: Gabriel Ávalos (Paraguay) wins a free kick in the defensive half.

events.description: 亚历山德罗·奇卡蒂犯规。

qualifiers.espnText: Nestory Irankunda (Australia) wins a free kick in the attacking half.

events.description: 安德烈斯·库巴斯犯规。

qualifiers.espnText: Diego Gómez (Paraguay) wins a free kick in the defensive half.

events.description: Diego Gómez赢得任意球。

qualifiers.espnText: Foul by Lucas Herrington (Australia).

events.description: 卢卡斯·赫灵顿犯规。

qualifiers.espnText: Aiden O'Neill (Australia) wins a free kick in the defensive half.

events.description: 胡安·何塞·卡塞雷斯犯规。

qualifiers.espnText: Corner, Australia. Conceded by Alexandro Maidana.

events.description: 澳大利亚获得角球。

qualifiers.espnText: Attempt blocked. Connor Metcalfe (Australia) left footed shot from outside the box is blocked. Assisted by Cristian Volpato.

events.description: 康纳·梅特卡夫射门被封堵。 克里斯蒂安·沃尔帕托参与进攻。

qualifiers.espnText: Delay in match for a drinks break.

events.description: 比赛暂停。

qualifiers.espnText: Delay over. They are ready to continue.

events.description: 比赛恢复。

qualifiers.espnText: Delay in match because of an injury Connor Metcalfe (Australia).

events.description: 比赛暂停。

qualifiers.espnText: Delay over. They are ready to continue.

events.description: 比赛恢复。

qualifiers.espnText: Aziz Behich (Australia) wins a free kick on the left wing.

events.description: 胡安·何塞·卡塞雷斯犯规。

qualifiers.espnText: Alessandro Circati (Australia) wins a free kick in the attacking half.

events.description: 恩西索犯规。

qualifiers.espnText: Attempt saved. Jordan Bos (Australia) left footed shot from outside the box is saved in the centre of the goal by Orlando Gill (Paraguay). Assisted by Cristian Volpato.

events.description: 乔丹·博斯射正。 克里斯蒂安·沃尔帕托参与进攻。

qualifiers.espnText: Attempt missed. Gabriel Ávalos (Paraguay) right footed shot from the centre of the box misses to the left. Assisted by Diego Gómez.

events.description: 加布里埃尔·阿瓦洛斯射门偏出。 迭戈·戈麦斯参与进攻。

qualifiers.espnText: Aziz Behich (Australia) wins a free kick in the defensive half.

events.description: 迭戈·戈麦斯犯规。

qualifiers.espnText: Attempt saved. Cristian Volpato (Australia) left footed shot from the right side of the box is saved in the top centre of the goal by Orlando Gill (Paraguay). Assisted by Jordan Bos.

events.description: 克里斯蒂安·沃尔帕托射正。 乔丹·博斯参与进攻。

qualifiers.espnText: Attempt missed. Jackson Irvine (Australia) header from the centre of the box is high and wide to the right. Assisted by Jordan Bos with a cross.

events.description: 杰克逊·埃尔文射门偏出。 乔丹·博斯参与进攻。

qualifiers.espnText: Fourth official has announced 6 minutes of added time.

events.description: 第四官员示意补时6分钟。

qualifiers.espnText: Foul by Cristian Volpato (Australia).

events.description: 克里斯蒂安·沃尔帕托犯规。

qualifiers.espnText: First Half ends, Paraguay 0, Australia 0.

events.description: 上半场结束。
毛里西奥 登场，亚历山德罗·迈达纳 离场

qualifiers.espnText: Second Half begins Paraguay 0, Australia 0.

events.description: 下半场开始。
杰克逊·埃尔文 黄牌

qualifiers.espnText: Attempt missed. Juan José Cáceres (Paraguay) right footed shot from more than 40 yards on the right wing is high and wide to the right.
